channel.title: statistics on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in statistics on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: Strange Correlations in COVID-19 Data
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: I recently had the pleasure to host another session of VisLies. As an early demonstration of lying with visualization, I presented these 2 graphs taken from data provided by the CDC for US states.1 The first plot seems to suggest that more vaccinations cause more people to die. The second plot, built from the same source data, suggests that more vaccinations prevent deaths. They cannot both be right. The difference is easily explained.
